data_sources: Etsy SEO guides 2026 (Marmalead, Printful, Insight Agent)
Sublimation seller community data (MakerFlo, Jennifer Maker)
meta.notes: Etsy caps displayed listing counts at 5,000+ for popular queries, so competition tiers reflect relative saturation observed across niches and sub-niches rather than exact counts. Prices are USD averages observed on Etsy. Opportunity score is calculated, not from Etsy.

competition_tiers.low: Sub-niche with fewer than ~500 specialized listings — easy to rank within 30-60 days
competition_tiers.medium: 500-2,000 specialized listings — rankable with strong SEO and unique angle
competition_tiers.very_high: Etsy displays 5,000+ items cap — only enter with unique sub-niche angle

niches.name: Wedding Favor Coasters
niches.competition_note: Established niche but buyers value uniqueness; sub-style + personalization wins
niches.design_angles: Couple names + date as primary text element. Rustic wood/cork backing aesthetic dominates. Wreath/floral monogram frames. Minimalist line drawings of venues. Heart/initial typography. Vinyl record shape for retro weddings.
niches.buyer_persona: Bride/groom (often the bride or wedding planner) ordering 50-200 units 3-6 months before wedding date
niches.pro_tips: Bulk pricing tiers (50/100/150/200) are standard. Always offer proof before production. Wood plywood 9cm round is industry standard. List 6-8 months before peak wedding season (Apr-Oct).

niches.name: Wedding Place Card Coasters
niches.competition_note: Underserved sub-niche of wedding favors — doubles as seating chart + take-home gift
niches.design_angles: Individual guest names with elegant calligraphy fonts. Wood, mirror gold/silver, frosted acrylic, rose gold. Layered design with guest name + table number. Functions as both seating card AND favor — strong dual-purpose value angle.
niches.buyer_persona: Bride planning a seated dinner reception (50-150 guests typical) wanting an upgrade from paper place cards
niches.pro_tips: Sell as a service: customer provides guest list spreadsheet → you produce one coaster per name. Higher perceived value than generic wedding favors. Less directly competitive with paper place cards because of the take-home function.

niches.name: Dog Memorial Coasters
niches.competition_note: Emotional gift niche — buyers willing to pay premium, less price-sensitive
niches.design_angles: Pet photo (vectorized line art for digital, photo print for sublimation) + pet name + dates. 'Always in our hearts' / 'Forever loved' / Rainbow Bridge poem excerpts. Paw print + name + DOB-DOD. Slate, dark wood, marble materials.
niches.buyer_persona: Grieving pet owner OR friend/family buying sympathy gift. High emotional investment = higher AOV. Often repeat customer for multiple pets.
niches.pro_tips: Use 'sympathy gift' angle to capture both grieving owner and gift-givers. Offer rush processing (people often need this within 1-2 weeks). Include short sympathy card in shipment. Photo-to-line-art service adds $5-10.

niches.name: Cat Memorial Coasters
niches.competition_note: Even less saturated than dog memorial — opportunity gap
niches.design_angles: Cat photo to line drawing. Whisker/paw motifs. Cat-specific phrases ('Forever my furry shadow', 'Once a cat parent, always a cat parent'). Often paired with cat zodiac/birth flower elements.
niches.buyer_persona: Grieving cat owner. Cat ownership is statistically slightly higher than dog ownership in some demographics yet receives fewer dedicated memorial products.
niches.pro_tips: Less crowded than dog memorial — easier to rank. Use breed-specific keywords (Maine Coon, Tabby, Black Cat, etc.) for ultra-long-tail.

niches.name: Housewarming Coasters (Personalized)
niches.competition_note: Common gift category but personalization angle keeps it competitive for skilled sellers
niches.design_angles: Family last name + established year. House silhouette + address. GPS coordinates of new home. State outline + city dot. 'The [Lastname] Family - Est. 2026'. Modern farmhouse aesthetic dominates.
niches.buyer_persona: Gift-givers (friends, family, realtors). Realtor closing-gift sub-market is very lucrative — repeat B2B buyers.
niches.pro_tips: Realtor closing-gift market is gold: contact local realtors directly, offer wholesale/repeat pricing. Realtors buy 20-50 sets/year. List 'realtor closing gift' as primary tag for B2B discovery.

niches.name: Realtor Closing Gift Coasters
niches.competition_note: B2B sub-niche of housewarming — realtors buy in repeat bulk
niches.design_angles: Address + family name + closing date. House silhouette + city skyline. Realtor logo + 'Welcome Home' messaging (B2B branded version). State outline with city pin. Includes care card with realtor contact info.
gift_occasions: anniversary of home purchase (some realtors gift annually)
niches.buyer_persona: Active realtors closing 10-50 transactions per year. They buy repeat batches and need fast turnaround (within 1 week of closing).
niches.pro_tips: Offer monthly subscription model: 'submit 5 client details/month, receive 5 sets'. Drop-ship directly to client address. Faster turnaround = premium pricing. Tag with city names (e.g., 'Austin realtor gift') for local SEO.

niches.name: Cottagecore Coasters
niches.competition_note: Aesthetic-driven niche — Pinterest interior trend forecast 2026 still strong
niches.design_angles: Mushrooms (toadstool, amanita), wildflower botanicals, vintage book plate illustrations, frog/snail/bee motifs, hand-lettered cottage phrases ('home is where the cottage is'), strawberries, wheat sheaves, cottage windows. Warm cream/sage/dusty pink palette.
niches.buyer_persona: Women 22-45, into slow living, vintage, sustainability. Strong overlap with 'Stardew Valley' / 'Studio Ghibli' fan demographics.
niches.pro_tips: Sublimation works beautifully for this niche (allows detailed vintage botanical illustrations). Bundle sets of 4 each with different botanical motif (e.g., one mushroom + one strawberry + one fern + one snail). Pinterest is the #1 traffic channel.

niches.name: Boho Coasters
niches.competition_note: Broad aesthetic — must combine boho + specific style (Afrohemian, macrame, dried flower)
niches.design_angles: Sun/moon faces, hands of fatima (Hamsa), Moroccan tile patterns, mudcloth-inspired prints, terracotta + sage + cream palette, abstract figure line drawings, dried palm leaves. 2026 Pinterest 'Afrohemian Decor' trend embraces African textile patterns.
niches.buyer_persona: Women 24-40 with apartment/first-home decor focus. Often into wellness/yoga/manifestation.
niches.pro_tips: Pinterest's 2026 Afrohemian Decor trend shows 80-100% search increase for related terms. Differentiate from generic boho by leaning into African textile patterns now.

niches.name: Y2K Aesthetic Coasters
niches.competition_note: Trending sub-niche — Y2K nostalgia for Gen Z home decor
niches.design_angles: Hot pink + chrome + iridescent, butterfly motifs, low-resolution bling rhinestone graphics, frutiger aero gradients, motorola flip phone illustrations, 2000s pop culture (no copyrighted IPs), 'cyber sigilism' fonts. Heavy chrome/metallic finishes.
niches.buyer_persona: Gen Z women (18-25), first apartment, dorm rooms, TikTok-driven purchases. Spends fast on aesthetic items.
niches.pro_tips: TikTok is the #1 traffic source for this niche. Avoid trademarked references (Britney Spears, specific brand logos). Hot pink + sparkle thumbnails outperform muted ones. Pair with 'dorm decor' tags to capture back-to-school season (July-September).

niches.name: Coquette / Bow Aesthetic Coasters
niches.competition_note: Emerging Gen Z aesthetic — first-mover opportunity
niches.design_angles: Pink bows (especially black ribbons on cream), pearl strings, lace borders, ballet slippers, vintage perfume bottles, cherub angels, hand-written cursive 'darling' / 'angel' / 'doll'. Cream + dusty pink + black bow accents.
niches.buyer_persona: Gen Z and younger millennial women (16-28). TikTok #coquette has billions of views.
niches.pro_tips: Coquette aesthetic exploded on TikTok 2024-2026 but is underserved on Etsy compared to demand. Bow-tied package presentation in product photos drives conversions. Pair with 'balletcore' tag.

niches.name: Dark Academia Coasters
niches.competition_note: Cult aesthetic with passionate but small audience — premium pricing possible
niches.design_angles: Vintage book covers, Latin phrases, classical statues (busts), oxford crests (non-trademarked), candle + book composition, fountain pen + ink, classical literature quotes (public domain — Shakespeare, Austen, Poe), brown/burgundy/forest green palette.
niches.buyer_persona: Literature/philosophy students, English majors, librarians, teachers, writers. Highly educated audience that pays premium for cultural references they 'get'.
niches.pro_tips: Use Latin phrases ('Vita Brevis, Ars Longa') for premium feel. Public domain literature quotes ONLY — never copyrighted lyrics or modern authors. Back-to-school spike (Aug-Sep) is the #1 sales window.

niches.name: Modern Farmhouse Coasters
niches.competition_note: Mainstream aesthetic with consistent demand — needs differentiation
niches.design_angles: Shiplap patterns, 'Gather' / 'Welcome' / 'Bless this home' hand-lettering, sunflowers, mason jars, vintage tractors, plaid patterns, white + cream + barn red palette, animal silhouettes (cow, chicken).
niches.buyer_persona: Women 30-55, suburban/rural, Pinterest-heavy, Joanna Gaines fans. Buys home decor in seasonal refreshes.
niches.pro_tips: Mainstream aesthetic = high competition. Differentiate by going hyper-specific: Texas farmhouse, Tennessee farmhouse, with state outline. Or by sub-style: 'modern farmhouse' (cleaner) vs 'primitive farmhouse' (more rustic).

niches.name: Mid-Century Modern Coasters
niches.competition_note: Steady design trend — appeals to higher-income buyers
niches.design_angles: Geometric shapes (atomic/starburst/boomerang), mustard + teal + olive + walnut wood palette, abstract organic shapes, Eames-inspired patterns, sunburst clocks, retro typography (Futura, Helvetica), wool felt material common.
niches.buyer_persona: Design-conscious adults 30-60, often in apartments/urban homes, design industry workers. Higher disposable income.
niches.pro_tips: Wool felt material commands premium pricing (one observed listing at 16.6K reviews — proves demand). Pair with 'walnut wood coaster holder' upsell.

niches.name: Minimalist Line Art Coasters
niches.competition_note: Wide appeal — needs unique subject matter to stand out
niches.design_angles: Single-line continuous drawings of faces/figures/bodies, abstract shapes in earth tones, organic blob shapes, scandinavian-inspired patterns, kinfolk magazine aesthetic, terracotta + cream + black accents.
niches.buyer_persona: Design-conscious millennials and Gen X. Apartment dwellers, urban professionals.
niches.pro_tips: 'Japandi' (Japanese + Scandinavian) is a fast-growing micro-aesthetic — tag for it specifically. Face line drawings are extremely popular on Pinterest for this style.

niches.name: Coffee Lover Coasters
niches.competition_note: Highly saturated — only enter with unique twist (specific drink type, region, humor angle)
niches.design_angles: Latte art line drawings, coffee bean illustrations, specific drink names (cortado, flat white, cold brew, oat milk latte), barista terminology, coffee-quote typography ('Espresso yourself', 'Life happens, coffee helps'), warm earth tones.
niches.buyer_persona: Adults 25-55 of all genders. Often gift purchasers (giving to a coffee-lover friend/family).
niches.pro_tips: Don't enter generic 'coffee lover' — go specialty: 'cold brew', 'iced latte', 'oat milk latte enthusiast', specific roastery regions (Ethiopian, Colombian). Coffee bar setup is a TikTok trend that drives traffic.

niches.name: Book Lover Coasters
niches.competition_note: Passionate audience but competitive — needs specific book genre angle
niches.design_angles: Stack of books illustrations, 'just one more chapter' quotes, fictional character archetypes (sun/moon-coded heroines), romance reader tropes ('enemies to lovers'), tea + book composition, vintage library card aesthetic. BookTok-driven specific genres: fantasy (sword/dragon icons), romantasy, dark romance.
niches.buyer_persona: Women 20-45, BookTok engaged, Kindle/physical book readers. Romance and fantasy are dominant sub-genres.
niches.pro_tips: 'Romantasy' and 'BookTok' have exploded since 2023. Don't reference specific copyrighted book titles or characters. Use trope-based language: 'morally grey' / 'one bed' / 'fae king'. Tag #BookTok aesthetics.

niches.name: Wine Lover Coasters
niches.competition_note: Saturated but evergreen — humor + region specificity wins
niches.design_angles: Wine glass illustrations, grape clusters, vineyard scenes, 'wine o'clock' / 'tastes like Tuesday' humor, region names (Napa, Sonoma, Bordeaux), specific varietals as separate coaster designs in a set, wine bottle silhouettes.
niches.buyer_persona: Women 30-55. Strong overlap with 'wine mom' meme demographic.
niches.pro_tips: 'Wine mom' humor still sells but is over-saturated. Differentiate with sophistication: natural wine, orange wine, sommelier-aware. Tag with specific vineyards/regions for travel-gift angle.

niches.name: Cocktail Recipe Coasters
niches.competition_note: Functional + decorative niche — underserved relative to demand
niches.design_angles: Recipe layout for one cocktail per coaster — ingredients + method + glassware. Standard set of 6: Margarita, Old Fashioned, Espresso Martini, Moscow Mule, Mojito, Negroni. OR theme sets: 'Tiki cocktails', 'Whiskey cocktails', 'Holiday cocktails'.
niches.buyer_persona: Adults 28-55 setting up home bars. Pandemic-era home cocktail trend is still strong.
niches.pro_tips: Functional value > decorative value here — buyers WILL reference the recipes. Use clear typography, mixed text + illustration. Include glassware drawing (rocks vs coupe vs collins) on each. Premium 'set of 12 cocktails' commands higher AOV.

niches.name: Whiskey & Bourbon Coasters
niches.competition_note: Strong masculine-leaning gift niche — premium pricing
niches.design_angles: Whiskey region maps (Kentucky bourbon trail, Islay Scotland), barrel illustrations, glass + ice illustrations, distillery names (research non-trademarked references), whiskey-aging chemistry diagrams, leather + brass color palette.
niches.buyer_persona: Wives, daughters, friends buying for men 35-65. Also self-purchase by whiskey enthusiasts. Strong gift-for-dad market.
niches.pro_tips: Father's Day (June) is the #1 sales window. Pair with 'groomsman gift' for wedding season. Avoid using trademarked distillery names (Jack Daniel's, Maker's Mark, etc.). Focus on category descriptors instead.

niches.name: Craft Beer Coasters
niches.competition_note: Niche within beer market — craft/IPA enthusiasts more spend-willing
niches.design_angles: Hops illustrations, beer style chart, IBU scales, beer pint glass silhouettes, brewing equipment diagrams, beer humor ('Hoppy days'), regional brewery references (without trademarked names).
niches.buyer_persona: Beer enthusiasts 25-55, often male, IPA/craft beer subculture.
niches.pro_tips: Homebrewers are a distinct sub-audience — they buy 'brewing day' themed coasters. Pair with 'man cave' tag for the broader market.

niches.name: Plant Lover / Houseplant Coasters
niches.competition_note: Houseplant trend still strong post-pandemic — plant-parent gift niche solid
niches.design_angles: Specific houseplant illustrations (Monstera Deliciosa, Snake Plant, Pothos, Philodendron, Fiddle Leaf Fig, ZZ plant). Plant pun typography ('Aloe you vera much', 'I lichen you a lot'). Botanical illustration style. Terracotta + sage + cream palette.
niches.buyer_persona: Women 22-40, houseplant enthusiasts, often urban apartment dwellers. Reddit r/houseplants community active.
niches.pro_tips: Specific plant species (Monstera, Pothos, Snake Plant) outperform generic 'plant lady' designs. Plant puns + scientific names side-by-side appeal to the audience.

niches.name: Tarot & Witchy Coasters
niches.competition_note: Strong cult audience — premium pricing despite smaller market
niches.design_angles: Major Arcana card illustrations (The Sun, The Moon, The Star — non-Rider-Waite illustrations), zodiac symbols, moon phases, crystal grids, hand of fatima, eye of providence, sacred geometry. Black + gold + deep purple palette.
niches.buyer_persona: Women 22-40, often into astrology/witchcraft/yoga/manifestation subcultures. Tumblr → TikTok-driven aesthetic.
niches.pro_tips: October (Halloween/Samhain) is the major peak. Bundle with zodiac sub-niche for crossover. Avoid Rider-Waite tarot card reproductions (copyrighted) — create original card-style illustrations.

niches.name: Zodiac / Astrology Coasters
niches.competition_note: 12-design potential per sign, strong gift use case
niches.design_angles: Each zodiac sign as its own design (12 designs total). Glyph + constellation + sign name + traits + element. Watercolor astrological scenes. Birth chart compositions for premium personalized.
niches.buyer_persona: Astrology enthusiasts 18-45. Strong female-leaning audience but male buyers for partner gifts.
niches.pro_tips: Build full set of 12 designs ONCE, sell year-round — each sign sells during its season (Aries: Mar 21-Apr 19, etc.). Bundle 'sun + moon + rising' personalized commands premium.

niches.name: Floral Car Coasters
niches.competition_note: Exploding demand on TikTok/Instagram — high competition but fast-growing market
niches.design_angles: Wildflower spreads, single daisy/sunflower, pressed flower aesthetic, boho neutral floral, Y2K floral, vintage botanical, 2-3 inch standard car cup holder fit. Neoprene material standard (absorbent + washable).
niches.buyer_persona: Teen girls (gift purchase by parents) + women 20-35 self-purchase. TikTok #carcoasters has massive views.
niches.pro_tips: TikTok-driven niche. Pinterest pin format works incredibly well. Sublimation onto neoprene is the standard production method. Bundle 'set of 2 matching designs' converts better than singles.

niches.name: Western / Cowgirl Car Coasters
niches.competition_note: Coastal cowgirl / Western aesthetic trending hard since 2024
niches.design_angles: Cowboy boots, cowboy hats, horse silhouettes, lasso scrolls, leather + turquoise palette, 'yeehaw' / 'howdy' typography, Western quotes ('Saddle up'), barbed wire patterns, Texas/state outlines.
niches.buyer_persona: Country music fans, rural women 18-40, urban women adopting 'coastal cowgirl' aesthetic. Country music fan demographic exploded after Beyoncé's country album.
niches.pro_tips: 'Coastal cowgirl' was the breakout aesthetic of 2024-2025 and continues into 2026. Avoid trademarked references (Yellowstone, specific singer names). Nashville-themed designs sell well year-round.

niches.name: Retro Checkered / Smiley Car Coasters
niches.competition_note: Saturated within car coaster niche but consistent seller
niches.design_angles: Black + white checker patterns, smiley faces (yellow, neutral), 'groovy' typography, 70s rainbow stripes, retro flower power (different from cottagecore — more bright/loud), beige + black checkered for neutral version.
niches.buyer_persona: Teen and young adult women 16-25. Strong TikTok-driven aesthetic.
niches.pro_tips: 'Neutral checkered' (beige + black) is the breakout sub-style. Pairs with 'preppy' aesthetic for upscale variant.

niches.name: Personalized Photo Car Coasters
niches.competition_note: Personalization premium — photo of partner/pet/baby on coaster
niches.design_angles: Photo + name + date layout. Heart frame around photo. Polaroid-style border. Multi-photo collage. Watercolor effect over photo. Photo + meaningful coordinates.
niches.buyer_persona: Partners, parents, grandparents wanting visible reminder in car. Long-distance relationship and military deployment markets are strong.
niches.pro_tips: Provide simple photo upload workflow — clear file requirements (300 DPI, square crop). Offer 'we'll improve your photo' service for additional fee. Military deployment angle ('Drive safe, I love you') is an emotional sub-niche.

niches.name: Funny / Sarcastic Drinking Coasters
niches.competition_note: Saturated but evergreen — strong-margin novelty gift category
niches.design_angles: Profanity-laced typography, drinking puns, anti-Monday humor, 'classy and shit' style, witty one-liners, Office-style sarcasm (no specific show references). Black + white minimal type designs sell best.
niches.buyer_persona: Adults 25-45. Gift-givers and self-buyers. Strong office gift exchange market.
niches.pro_tips: F-word coasters polarize but convert at higher rates than mild humor — pick a lane. Bundle 'PG' and 'R-rated' versions as separate listings to capture both markets. 'White Elephant' tag captures December gift exchange traffic.

niches.name: Office / Work Humor Coasters
niches.competition_note: Corporate gift sub-niche — coworker gift exchanges drive sales
niches.design_angles: Spreadsheet jokes, 'this meeting could've been an email', work-from-home reality, Slack/Zoom culture humor, project management humor, generic 'I survived another Monday' humor.
niches.buyer_persona: Office workers, managers, coworkers gifting each other. Corporate orders possible for company-wide gifts.
niches.pro_tips: December (Secret Santa) is the #1 sales window. Personalize with job title/company role for $5-10 premium. Avoid specific software brand references (Excel logo, Slack logo).

niches.name: Mom Life Humor Coasters
niches.competition_note: Saturated but enormous audience — must add sub-specificity
niches.design_angles: Coffee-fueled humor, sleep deprivation jokes, kid quote diaries, milk-and-cookies aesthetic, specific demographics (boy mom, girl mom, twin mom, special needs mom). 'Mom of [n] who needs coffee' personalization.
niches.buyer_persona: Mothers 25-45, gift-givers (spouses, kids) for moms. Niche sub-segments: 'boy mom' / 'girl mom' / 'twin mom' / 'special needs mom' all have dedicated communities.
niches.pro_tips: Lean into sub-demographics rather than generic 'mom life'. Personalized with kids' names + birthdays is premium. Mother's Day spike is enormous — list 3-4 weeks before May.

niches.name: Christmas Personalized Coasters
niches.competition_note: Seasonal peak — list 3 months ahead for SEO maturation
niches.design_angles: Family name + year ('The Smith Family Christmas 2026'), Christmas tree silhouettes, Santa illustrations (non-coca-cola style — original art), nutcrackers, gingerbread, snowflake patterns, plaid + buffalo check, red + green or pink + champagne color palettes for modern style.
niches.buyer_persona: Adults 25-65 buying family gifts. Annual repeat purchases possible (year-after-year sets).
niches.pro_tips: List by mid-September latest — Etsy ranking takes 4-6 weeks. October 1 = peak browsing starts. 'Christmas 2026' specific text gives buyers urgency. Bundle 'Christmas Eve box' for stocking stuffer market.

niches.name: Halloween Coasters
niches.competition_note: Seasonal niche — Halloween home decor grew massively post-2020
niches.design_angles: Cute ghosts (boo-tique style), vintage Halloween illustrations, witchy moon phases, pumpkin patches, skeleton portraits, 'spooky season' typography, classic black + orange OR muted pink + purple ('pink Halloween' trend), 'witchy not bitchy' humor.
niches.buyer_persona: Adults 22-45. 'Spooky season' is now a year-round identity for many — they buy Halloween decor in July/August.
niches.pro_tips: List by mid-July at latest. 'Pink/pastel Halloween' is a fast-growing sub-aesthetic — undersupplied. Skeletons as year-round decor (not just October) is a sub-trend.

niches.name: Valentine's Day Couple Coasters
niches.competition_note: Personalized couple gift sub-niche — strong intent buyers
niches.design_angles: His + Hers / His + His / Hers + Hers (inclusive sets), couple names + 'est. [year]', heart motifs, coordinates of first meeting, mixed-format couple set (one masculine, one feminine).
niches.buyer_persona: Adults 22-45 in committed relationships. Often last-minute Valentine's gift purchases — fast shipping is a competitive edge.
niches.pro_tips: List by mid-January. Offer 'guaranteed by Feb 14' shipping. Include same-sex couple set variants in main listing photos for inclusivity SEO.

niches.name: National Parks Coasters
niches.competition_note: Travel collector niche — buyers collect entire sets
niches.design_angles: Vintage national park poster style (WPA-inspired), park outline maps, iconic landmarks (Old Faithful, Half Dome, El Capitan, Delicate Arch), wildlife illustrations (bison, bears, eagles), 'Established [year]' typography, muted earth tones.
niches.buyer_persona: Outdoor enthusiasts 25-65, retirees with travel, hikers, park rangers. Strong souvenir-collector mentality.
niches.pro_tips: Make ONE coaster per park = 63+ designs. Buyers collect 'all parks visited'. Bundle '5-park starter set' lets buyers continue collecting. WPA-inspired vintage poster style is the dominant aesthetic.

niches.name: City Skyline / Travel Coasters
niches.competition_note: Each city = own micro-niche. Total addressable market large.
niches.design_angles: Minimalist city skylines (silhouette style), watercolor city paintings, city map line drawings, 'I left my heart in [city]' typography, vintage travel poster style.
niches.buyer_persona: Travel enthusiasts, people who've moved cities, expats. Travel-souvenir collectors.
niches.pro_tips: Top US cities first (NYC, LA, Chicago, San Francisco, Boston, Austin), then top international (Paris, Tokyo, London, Rome, Barcelona). 'I left my heart in [city]' typography is a proven format.

niches.name: Golf Coasters
niches.competition_note: Niche hobby with affluent buyers — strong gift use case
niches.design_angles: Golf course hole layouts, vintage golf scorecard style, 'tee time' / '19th hole' typography, golf club silhouettes, golf ball + tee illustrations, country club aesthetic, masculine green + cream + leather palette.
niches.buyer_persona: Golfers 40-70 (predominantly male), wives buying for husbands, daughters buying for fathers. Affluent demographic = higher willingness to pay.
niches.pro_tips: Father's Day is the #1 sales window. 'Golf retirement gift' is a profitable sub-niche. Personalized with handicap number is a clever angle.

niches.name: Fishing Coasters
niches.competition_note: Underserved compared to hunting/golf — opportunity for sellers
niches.design_angles: Fish species illustrations (bass, trout, salmon, walleye), fly fishing flies (artistic), tackle box illustrations, fishing rod silhouettes, lake outline maps, 'gone fishing' typography, vintage fishing license aesthetic.
niches.buyer_persona: Outdoorsmen 35-70, family members buying Father's Day gifts. Less crowded than golf market.
niches.pro_tips: Fly fishing is the premium sub-segment (higher AOV). 'Lake house decor' tag captures vacation-home market. State-specific fish (Florida largemouth bass, Pacific NW salmon) for regional SEO.

niches.name: Horse Lover / Equestrian Coasters
niches.competition_note: Affluent niche audience, premium pricing
niches.design_angles: Horse breed illustrations (Arabian, Quarter Horse, Thoroughbred), dressage moves, horseshoe motifs, jockey silhouettes, vintage horse race poster style, leather + chestnut + cream palette.
niches.buyer_persona: Equestrians 25-65, often affluent (horse ownership requires high disposable income). Mostly female riders, but male competitors too.
niches.pro_tips: Kentucky Derby (first Saturday in May) drives huge spike. Personalized with horse's name + photo is premium. Pair with 'barn warming gift' for new stable openers.

niches.name: Anniversary Personalized Coasters
niches.competition_note: Repeat-purchase potential (annual anniversaries) — strong angle for non-traditional anniversary gift types
niches.design_angles: Couple names + wedding date + years married. Traditional anniversary materials per year (paper/wood/pottery/etc) tagged for SEO. 'Through it all' / 'Still our song' typography. Wedding location coordinates.
niches.buyer_persona: Spouses ordering for partner, OR adult children ordering for parents' milestone anniversary.
niches.pro_tips: Traditional anniversary materials are SEO gold: '5 year wood anniversary', '9 year pottery anniversary' (ceramic coasters), '25 year silver anniversary'. List for each year individually.

niches.name: Bachelorette Party Coasters
niches.competition_note: Time-bound urgent purchases — premium pricing for personalization
niches.design_angles: Bride name + 'Bach in [city]' (Nashville, Miami, Austin, Charleston, Scottsdale are top destinations), 'Last sip as a single girl', 'Bride Tribe' typography, disco ball aesthetic, cowgirl bach (Nashville), beach bach (Miami).
niches.buyer_persona: Maid of honor / wedding planner / the bride herself ordering 8-15 coasters for the weekend.
niches.pro_tips: Destination-specific designs (Nashville, Miami, Austin) are #1. Sell as 'fully customized weekend kit' premium. Quick turnaround (3-7 days) is critical — these are last-minute purchases.

niches.name: Milestone Birthday Coasters (21/30/40/50)
niches.competition_note: Each milestone (21/30/40/50/60) is its own micro-niche
niches.design_angles: 'Made in [birth year]' / 'Vintage 1986' typography. Big number focus (21, 30, 40, 50). Birthday-specific humor ('Dirty Thirty', 'Fabulous 40', 'Nifty 50'). Black + gold + champagne palette.
niches.buyer_persona: Friends/family of birthday person, often partners or best friends. Strong gift use case.
niches.pro_tips: Build ONE template per milestone (21/30/40/50/60/70), refresh annually with new birth year. 'Made in [year]' format is evergreen — just update the year. 21st birthday has drinking-humor crossover (highest AOV).

niches.name: Bridal Shower Coasters
niches.competition_note: Shower-specific decor distinct from wedding favors
niches.design_angles: 'Miss to Mrs', 'Bride to Be' typography. Champagne flute illustrations. Pearl/ring motifs. Cake/champagne icons. White + champagne + dusty pink color palette.
niches.buyer_persona: Maid of honor or family member hosting the shower.
niches.pro_tips: Sell as bridal shower 'kit' bundled with napkins/etc for higher AOV. Mid-luxury aesthetic (champagne/pearl) outperforms casual styles.

niches.name: Baby Shower Coasters
niches.competition_note: Underserved compared to bridal showers — opportunity gap
niches.design_angles: 'Mom to Be' / 'Almost a Mama' typography. Onesie + bottle illustrations. Pacifier + rattle motifs. Pastel pink/blue/yellow/sage palettes. Gender-neutral sage/cream popular for modern showers.
niches.buyer_persona: Sister/friend/mother of mom-to-be hosting shower.
niches.pro_tips: Less crowded than bridal showers — easier to rank. Gender-neutral sage/cream is a fast-growing aesthetic. 'Sip and See' (post-birth shower) is an underserved sub-niche.

niches.name: Graduation Coasters
niches.competition_note: Underserved seasonal niche — May/June spike
niches.design_angles: Diploma roll illustrations, graduation cap motifs, 'Class of [year]' typography, school colors palettes, school mascot silhouettes (avoid trademarked), 'I survived [school]' humor variants.
niches.buyer_persona: Parents, grandparents, friends gifting graduates. Higher AOV for advanced degree graduations (PhD, MD, JD).
niches.pro_tips: List 'Class of 2027' / 'Class of 2028' templates in January for early Etsy ranking. Advanced degree gifts (PhD, MD, JD) command 2-3x prices. School-specific (no trademarks — use color palettes only) for college tags.

niches.name: Father's Day Coasters
niches.competition_note: Concentrated demand around June — list early
niches.design_angles: 'Best Dad' / 'Dad Bod' / 'Beer + Grill = Dad' humor. Custom 'Dad of [kids' names]' personalization. Tool motifs. Grill/BBQ illustrations. Specific 'first Father's Day' sub-niche with baby footprint.
niches.buyer_persona: Spouses/kids of dads. 'First Father's Day' is a strong premium sub-niche.
niches.pro_tips: Start listing April 15 latest for June peak. 'First Father's Day' is the highest-AOV sub-niche. 'Step Dad' / 'Bonus Dad' is underserved.

niches.name: Mother's Day Coasters
niches.competition_note: Massive concentrated spend — list 6 weeks ahead
niches.design_angles: 'Mom of [kids' names]' personalization. Wildflower bouquets. Heart + family motifs. Birth flowers + kids' names. 'First Mother's Day' for new moms (baby photo).
niches.buyer_persona: Adult children, spouses, gift-purchasing for moms.
niches.pro_tips: List by mid-March. 'First Mother's Day' photo upload is premium. 'Step Mom' / 'Bonus Mom' is high-converting underserved sub-niche.

niches.name: Vinyl Record / Music Coasters
niches.competition_note: Music lover gift sub-niche — vinyl resurgence drives demand
niches.design_angles: Vinyl record silhouettes, album cover-style frames (original art, no trademarks), guitar/drumstick illustrations, music note typography, 'song that means something' personalized lyric coasters (caution: original lyrics or public domain only).
niches.buyer_persona: Music enthusiasts 25-55, vinyl collectors, audiophiles. Lyric-coaster sub-niche risks copyright — avoid named songs.
niches.pro_tips: DO NOT reproduce specific song lyrics (copyright). 'Custom your favorite vinyl' = personalized blank-template approach safer. Music room decor angle works year-round.

niches.name: Gamer Coasters
niches.competition_note: Underserved given the size of gaming audience — avoid copyrighted IPs
niches.design_angles: Generic controller silhouettes (no specific brand/model), pixel art aesthetic, retro 8-bit style, health bar / mana meter graphics, 'Player 1' / 'Player 2' couples sets, RGB glow aesthetic. Strictly NO Nintendo/PlayStation/Xbox logos or character art.
niches.buyer_persona: Partners of gamers (gift purchases), gamers themselves (self-purchase decor), parents buying for teen kids.
niches.pro_tips: AVOID all copyrighted gaming IP (Mario, Zelda, Pokemon, Halo, etc) — Nintendo aggressive on takedowns. Generic 'gamer aesthetic' is the safe lane. 'Couple gamer' (Player 1/Player 2) is a popular angle.

niches.name: Teacher Appreciation Coasters
niches.competition_note: Seasonal concentrated demand (May appreciation week + end of year)
niches.design_angles: 'Best Teacher Ever' typography. Apple + book + pencil motifs. Personalized 'Mrs. [Name]' option. Teacher humor ('Powered by caffeine and dry erase markers'). Subject-specific designs (math, science, English teacher).
niches.buyer_persona: Parents buying for kids' teachers. Often need 1-2 personalized coasters for specific teacher names.
niches.pro_tips: Subject-specific coasters (math teacher, English teacher, kindergarten teacher) outperform generic. Personalized 'Mrs. Johnson' coasters are premium AOV.

niches.name: Nurse / Medical Professional Coasters
niches.competition_note: Profession-specific gift niche — nurse population large
niches.design_angles: Stethoscope motifs, 'Trust me I'm a nurse' humor, RN/BSN/MSN credentials typography, specialty-specific (ICU, ER, NICU, L&D), nurse-specific drinks humor ('Run on coffee and saving lives').
niches.buyer_persona: Spouses/family of nurses + nurses self-purchasing + grateful patients gifting healthcare staff.
niches.pro_tips: Specialty-specific (ICU vs ER vs NICU) outperforms generic 'nurse gift'. National Nurses Week (May 6-12) is the major peak. Med school graduation crossover with graduation niche.

niches.name: Veterinarian / Vet Tech Coasters
niches.competition_note: Highly underserved profession gift niche
niches.design_angles: Stethoscope + paw print combo. 'Vet life' typography. DVM credentials. Specific animal silhouettes (dog/cat/exotic). 'Veterinary medicine: where every patient bites' humor.
niches.buyer_persona: Vet families + pet owners thanking their vet + vet students self-purchase.
niches.pro_tips: Even more underserved than nurse niche. National Vet Tech Week (mid-October) is a sub-peak. Pet owners gifting their vets is a powerful sub-segment.
